Suwanji Madanayake Shines in Masters Cricket Tournament

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Suwanji Madanayake Shines in Masters Cricket Tournament

Sri Lankan veteran Suwanji Madanayake impressed fans and analysts alike with his all-round showing in the Masters Cricket Tournament, showcasing elite skills despite his age and reaffirming his legacy in Sri Lankan cricket.
